settings.title: Natural Pearls
settings.description: Each pearl is formed naturally — irregular in shape, unique in luster. We select baroque and freshwater pearls for their organic beauty.

settings.title: Gemstones
settings.description: Amethyst, agate, quartz — hand-cut and minimally polished to preserve natural texture and color variation.

settings.title: Sterling Silver
settings.description: S925 sterling silver details, hand-finished with care. Each clasp and accent is crafted for comfort and longevity.

settings.heading: What You Wear Says Something About Who You Are
settings.body_text: Every stone carries a story. Not magic — just the quiet symbolism of choosing something natural, something real, something that feels like yours.

settings.review_text: The amethyst bracelet is stunning — each stone has its own character. It feels special every time I put it on.
settings.author: Sarah M.

settings.review_text: I bought the Aura Balance as a gift and my sister hasn't taken it off since. Beautiful craftsmanship and fast shipping.
settings.author: Emily R.

settings.review_text: The natural pearls and stones are gorgeous. You can really tell the difference from mass-produced jewelry.
settings.author: Jessica T.

settings.title: Gift-Ready Packaging
settings.description: Every piece arrives in a signature box, ready to gift or to keep for yourself.
